cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.13)

# GrumbleQuest — Emscripten / WebAssembly build.
#
# Configure with emcmake so the SDK's toolchain file is picked up:
#   cd web && mkdir -p build && cd build
#   emcmake cmake ..
#   emmake  make -j
# Output: build/grumblequest.html + .js + .wasm + .data
#
# Driven from the top-level Makefile via `make web` — see there for the
# user-facing entry points.

project(grumblequest_web C)
set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD 11)

set(REPO_ROOT ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/..)

# Sprite sheets and the map file are not generated by this build — they
# come from the sprite pipeline (`make sprites`) which runs from the
# top-level Makefile as a prerequisite of `make web`. If any are missing,
# fail loudly rather than shipping a half-broken .data file.
set(SHEET_TILES ${REPO_ROOT}/build/assets_iso_tiles.png)
set(SHEET_CHARS ${REPO_ROOT}/build/assets_chars.png)
set(SHEET_ITEMS ${REPO_ROOT}/build/assets_items.png)
set(MAP_FILE    ${REPO_ROOT}/assets/maps/map.bin)
foreach(f ${SHEET_TILES} ${SHEET_CHARS} ${SHEET_ITEMS} ${MAP_FILE})
    if(NOT EXISTS ${f})
        message(FATAL_ERROR "missing asset: ${f}\n"
            "Run `make sprites` at the repo root before configuring this build.")
    endif()
endforeach()

set(GAME_CORE_SOURCES
    ${REPO_ROOT}/src/game/state.c
    ${REPO_ROOT}/src/game/items.c
    ${REPO_ROOT}/src/game/world.c
    ${REPO_ROOT}/src/game/player.c
    ${REPO_ROOT}/src/game/skills.c
    ${REPO_ROOT}/src/game/tick.c
    ${REPO_ROOT}/src/game/save.c
    ${REPO_ROOT}/src/render/renderer.c
    ${REPO_ROOT}/src/render/render_debug.c
    ${REPO_ROOT}/src/render/iso_spritesheet.c
    ${REPO_ROOT}/src/render/font.c
    ${REPO_ROOT}/src/ui/hud.c
    ${REPO_ROOT}/src/ui/menu.c
)

add_executable(grumblequest
    ${REPO_ROOT}/src/main_web.c
    ${REPO_ROOT}/src/game_loop.c
    ${REPO_ROOT}/src/hal_web.c
    ${GAME_CORE_SOURCES}
)

target_include_directories(grumblequest PRIVATE
    ${REPO_ROOT}/src
    ${REPO_ROOT}/third_party
)

# Emscripten-specific link flags:
#   USE_SDL=2        — SDL2 JS port (drives the <canvas> and keyboard state)
#   ALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH — preloads push baseline RAM; allow headroom
#   INITIAL_MEMORY   — 32 MiB leaves room for the sprite atlases + framebuffer
#   --preload-file   — baked into grumblequest.data, readable via fopen at runtime
#   --shell-file     — template HTML page (touch controls live here)
#   EXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=['ccall'] — shell.html may call ccall for resets
set(LINK_FLAGS
    "-sUSE_SDL=2"
    "-sALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1"
    "-sINITIAL_MEMORY=33554432"
    "-sEXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=[\"ccall\"]"
    "--preload-file" "${SHEET_TILES}@assets_iso_tiles.png"
    "--preload-file" "${SHEET_CHARS}@assets_chars.png"
    "--preload-file" "${SHEET_ITEMS}@assets_items.png"
    "--preload-file" "${MAP_FILE}@assets/maps/map.bin"
    "--shell-file"   "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/shell.html"
)
string(REPLACE ";" " " LINK_FLAGS_STR "${LINK_FLAGS}")
set_target_properties(grumblequest PROPERTIES
    LINK_FLAGS "${LINK_FLAGS_STR}"
    SUFFIX     ".html"
)
